channel.title: Work-Life Balance on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Work-Life Balance on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Staying Healthy While Developing Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about recent findings in fossilized endothermic theorapsids.

item.title: Being Happy
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about being happy.

item.title: Avoiding Burnout
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about avoiding burnout and specifically want to talk about how I avoided burnout.

item.title: My Lost Decade
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my lost decade which is what I call 1993 to 2003, and I think

item.title: Work-Life Balance
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my thoughts on work-life balance in the game industry.
